title: premna hamiltonii
intro: Premna hamiltonii, also known as Hamilton's Ironwood or Ironwood, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Premna hamiltonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Premna hamiltonii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other infectious diseases.
